title: Set up data sources for various content types

trash_guides.title: Data sources for the Trash Guides

config_templates.title: Data sources for the Recyclarr Config Templates

custom_formats.title: Data sources for additional custom format JSON files
custom_formats.description: These supplement the ones provided by the Trash Guides. The custom format JSON files are expected to be in the same format as the ones provided by the Trash Guides.

media_naming.title: Data sources for additional media naming JSON files
media_naming.description: These supplement the ones provided by the Trash Guides. The media naming JSON files are expected to be in the same format as the ones provided by the Trash Guides.

radarr.title: Sources of data compatible with Radarr

sonarr.title: Sources of data compatible with Sonarr

path.title: Path to a directory containing the expected data files

clone_url.title: Git clone URL for the repository

name.title: Required name used to uniquely identify this repository.
name.description: May only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores. Must be unique across all data sources for a single a content type

reference.title: Optional branch name or SHA1 commit hash to check out
